Package com.cake.struts.content.shape

Class StrutInteractionHandler

java.lang.Object
com.cake.struts.content.shape.StrutInteractionHandler
public class StrutInteractionHandler extends Object
Client-side handler for strut connection selection and BigOutline rendering.

Call updateOutlineShapes(net.minecraft.world.level.Level, com.cake.struts.content.block.StrutBlockEntity) whenever a StrutBlockEntity receives updated connection data on the client, and removeOutlineShapes(net.minecraft.world.level.Level, net.minecraft.core.BlockPos) when the block entity is removed.

  • Method Details

    • updateOutlineShapes

      public static void updateOutlineShapes(net.minecraft.world.level.Level level, StrutBlockEntity be)
      Rebuilds all outline shapes for the connections owned by the given StrutBlockEntity. Must be called on the client thread.

    • removeOutlineShapes

      public static void removeOutlineShapes(net.minecraft.world.level.Level level, net.minecraft.core.BlockPos pos)
      Removes all outline shapes associated with a block position. Must be called on the client thread.
